title: S.A.M Custom Playable Race
description: A mod-defined playable race that rides an existing monster body. Registered into a reserved race id (200-255); appears in the character-select race picker, renders as its host body in both third- and first-person, and applies flat attribute/HP/MP bonuses at character creation. A vanilla or mod-less client that loads such a character plays it as Human (graceful degrade).

name.description: Display name shown in the character-select race picker, e.g. "Frostborn".

host_body.description: The existing monster body this race renders as. Only these 18 bodies have a proper first-person arm, so both views are correct.

description.description: Short flavour text for the race (shown in the picker's info panel).

stat_modifiers.description: Flat attribute / HP / MP bonuses added at character creation (may be negative). Vanilla races give no attribute bonuses, so these are the race's whole stat identity.
